repos.name: misogynistic-text-detector
repos.description: This repository hosts a classifier to detect misogynistic speech by leveraging transfer learning from Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers (BERT) for a small number of expert-tagged imbalanced samples.

repos.name: keras-image-classification-v12-
repos.description: Production-ready Image Classification in Keras with {Docker, Nginx, Flask-RestPlus, Gunicorn WSGI, TensorFlow Serving}
